見你咁好學, 幫人幫到底啦!
1) 係Excel 撳Alt+F11 打開VBA
2) 撳Ctrl+R 打開Project Explorer
3) 係VBAProject到 Right Click -> Insert -> Module
4) Double Click Module1
5) 貼上我下面段Code (Function 到 End Function)
6) 要如下次都要用 唔想再做一次, Excel 要Save做 .xlsm

之後你就可係係Excel 入面直接用 =Original_Poster_is_On99(StartTime, EndTime)
幫你加做埋 早過12點返工/21點後OT 都係唔計人工 (但你可以照入 e.g 11-23 都係 = $570)

Code:

Function Original_Poster_is_On99(StartTime As Integer, EndTime As Integer)
Dim I As Integer
For I = StartTime To EndTime - 1
If I >= 12 And I < 15 Then
Original_Poster_is_On99 = Original_Poster_is_On99 + 50
ElseIf I >= 15 And I < 21 Then
Original_Poster_is_On99 = Original_Poster_is_On99 + 70
End If
Next I
End Function

3) 係VBAProject到 Right Click -> Insert -> Module

5) 貼上我下面段Code (Function 到 End Function)
6) 要如下次都要用 唔想再做一次, Excel 要Save做 .xlsm

之後你就可係係Excel 入面直接用 =Original_Poster_is_On99(StartTime, EndTime)
幫你加做埋 早過12點返工/21點後OT 都係唔計人工 (但你可以照入 e.g 11-23 都係 = $570)

Code:

Function Original_Poster_is_On99(StartTime As Integer, EndTime As Integer)
Dim I As Integer
For I = StartTime To EndTime - 1
If I >= 12 And I < 15 Then
Original_Poster_is_On99 = Original_Poster_is_On99 + 50
ElseIf I >= 15 And I < 21 Then
Original_Poster_is_On99 = Original_Poster_is_On99 + 70
End If
Next I
End Function
